channel.title: on Jacob Nibauer
channel.description: Recent content in on Jacob Nibauer

item.title: Research
item.description: The Statistics of Extended Debris Disks Measured with Gaia and Planck with Eric Baxter (UPenn/Cambridge) and Bhuvnesh Jain (UPenn) arxiv: 1912.10498 | Submitted Circumstellar debris disks provide key insights to the planet formation process, and are linked with the discovery of nearby exoplanets. Through a novel likelihood based approach, we use the submillimeter Planck survey, cross-correlated with data from Gaia, in order to place constraints on properties of debris disks, including the number of stars with disks.

item.title: Teaching
item.description: Spring 2020 Recitations: Monday DRL 4E19, 8-8:50am | 9-9:50am Friday DRL 2C4, 9-9:50am Recitation worksheets will be uploaded on a weekly basis here Office hours: Monday TBA Wednesday TBA Friday TBA Math 114E: Multivariable Calculus for Engineers This page can also be accessed with the url https://tinyurl.com/jake114e2020. Weekly Additional Problems (with Solutions, eventually!) Vol. 1 Ch.1-6 Vol. 1 Ch.7-12 Vol.
